description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3 Docker image globally and defining a before_script that runs pip install tox. Define two stages: lint and test. In the lint stage add a flake8 job that runs the command tox -e flake8, and an isort job that runs tox -e isort. In the test stage add a py37-dj22-wagtail27 job that uses the python:3.7 image and runs tox -e py37-dj22-wagtail27, a py38-dj22-wagtail27 job that also uses python:3.7 and runs tox -e py37-dj22-wagtail27, and a py38-dj22-wagtailmaster job that uses python:3.8 and runs tox -e py37-dj22-wagtail27, with no additional caches, artifacts, or rules.
